Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Valinhall Travelers]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 6''' — There are other Valinhall Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 9''' — A Valinhall Traveler summons power into themselves rather than summoning powers from outside themselves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 22''' — Valinhall Travelers excel in combat with other Territories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 23''' — A Valinhall Traveler summoned a ten-foot long sword and had chains of shadow on his arms.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Simon is a Valinhall Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Valinhall Travelers are a rare breed whose Territory was created rather than born.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Valinhall Travelers are described as a twisted abomination whose purpose is to kill real Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Leah asked Simon how he became a Valinhall Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Valinhall Travelers are becoming rarer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Grandmaster Naraka shot a poisonous glance at the Valinhall Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — The Valinhall Traveler is a white-haired swordsman with a black gauntlet on his left hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — The Valinhall Traveler has marks on his arms like links from a chain of shadows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — There are Valinhall Travelers who expect Simon's help.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — A Valinhall Traveler threw Grandmaster Asphodel's head in a sack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 17''' — Valinhall Travelers are set to face the Wanderer once again.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 17''' — Valinhall Travelers are a type of Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Valinhall Travelers have duties to perform.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — There are three other Valinhall Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Indirial is a Valinhall Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Talos referred to the Valinhall Travelers.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — A team of Valinhall Travelers could bring down an Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — The graves in the graveyard belong to eight dead Valinhall Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 8''' — Valinhall will soon have masks among its weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 8''' — Andra Agnos is a Valinhall Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Leah requires a pair of Valinhall Travelers for the mission.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Two Valinhall Travelers passed through the door.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — The Successor is accompanied by a young Valinhall Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — The Valinhall Traveler is a cloaked man with a cracked sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — Valinhall Travelers possess chain-shaped marks on their hands and arms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — The Valinhall Traveler has black chain-marks on his collar and uses a cracked sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — A Valinhall Traveler in the outside world can summon his blade from the House.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — A Valinhall Traveler is a type of entity/power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Zakareth's first step is to destroy or recruit the Valinhall Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — The Valinhall Travelers include Simon, Andra, Kathrin, Denner, and Caela.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Leah keeps Valinhall Travelers around.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 28''' — Valinhall has Travelers.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
